text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Trainer! 
All right, ready to go shopping?♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You know, meeting up before an outing 
like this… kinda looks like we're going 
on a date, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Kidding! Did I getcha? Did I make 
your heart skip a beat?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Looks like my ladylike charms 
are pretty effective after all☆
